questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 解決方案架構師正在為跨多個可用區部署的 Web 應用程式設計共用儲存解決方案。 Web 應用程式在 Auto Scaling 群組中的 Amazon EC2 執行個體上執行。該公司計劃經常更改內容。解決方案必須具有強一致性，一旦發生變更就返回新內容。哪些解決方案滿足這些要求？ （選兩個。）
question_text.en: A solutions architect is designing a shared storage solution for a web application that is deployed across multiple Availability Zones. The web application runs on Amazon EC2 instances that are in an Auto Scaling group. The company plans to make frequent changes to the content. The solution must have strong consistency in returning the new content as soon as the changes occur. Which solutions meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 使用安裝到各個 EC2 執行個體的 AWS Storage Gateway Volume Gateway Internet 小型電腦系統介面 (iSCSI) 區塊儲存。
A.en: Use AWS Storage Gateway Volume Gateway Internet Small Computer Systems Interface (iSCSI) block storage that is mounted to the individual EC2 instances.

B.zh: 建立 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) 檔案系統。在各個 EC2 執行個體上掛載 EFS 檔案系統。
B.en: Create an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system. Mount the EFS file system on the individual EC2 instances.

C.zh: 建立共用 Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) 磁碟區。在各個 EC2 執行個體上安裝 EBS 磁碟區。
C.en: Create a shared Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volume. Mount the EBS volume on the individual EC2 instances.

D.zh: 使用 AWS DataSync 在 Auto Scaling 群組中的 EC2 主機之間執行資料的持續同步。
D.en: Use AWS DataSync to perform continuous synchronization of data between EC2 hosts in the Auto Scaling group.

E.zh: 建立 Amazon S3 儲存桶來儲存 Web 內容。將 Cache-Control 標頭的元資料設定為 no-cache。使用 Amazon CloudFront 交付內容。
E.en: Create an Amazon S3 bucket to store the web content. Set the metadata for the Cache-Control header to no-cache. Use Amazon CloudFront to deliver the content.

A.zh: 錯誤。使用 AWS Storage Gateway Volume Gateway Internet 小型電腦系統介面 (iSCSI) 區塊儲存並將其安裝在單一 EC2 執行個體上。錯誤：AWS Storage Gateway Volume Gateway 主要用於混合雲場景，將本機儲存擴展到 AWS 雲端中，不適合跨多個可用區的共享儲存需求。
A.en: Incorrect. Use AWS Storage Gateway Volume Gateway Internet Small Computer Systems Interface (iSCSI) block storage and mount it on a single EC2 instance. Error: AWS Storage Gateway Volume Gateway is mainly used in hybrid cloud scenarios to extend local storage into the AWS cloud and is not suitable for shared storage needs across multiple availability zones.

B.zh: 正確。建立 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) 檔案系統。將 EFS 檔案系統掛載到單一 EC2 執行個體上。正確：Amazon EFS 支援跨多個可用區共享文件，提供強一致性，適合內容頻繁更新的場景。
B.en: Correct. Create an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system. Mount the EFS file system onto a single EC2 instance. Correct: Amazon EFS supports shared files across multiple availability zones, providing strong consistency and suitable for scenarios where content is frequently updated.

C.zh: 錯誤。建立共用 Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) 磁碟區。將 EBS 磁碟區掛載到單一 EC2 執行個體。錯誤：Amazon EBS 磁碟區只能掛載到單一 EC2 實例，無法實現跨多個可用區的共用儲存。
C.en: Incorrect. Create a shared Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volume. Mount the EBS volume to a single EC2 instance. Error: Amazon EBS volumes can only be mounted to a single EC2 instance, and shared storage across multiple Availability Zones cannot be achieved.

D.zh: 錯誤。使用 AWS DataSync 在 Auto Scaling 群組中的 EC2 主機之間執行連續資料同步。錯誤：AWS DataSync 主要用於資料遷移或同步。不適合即時共享儲存場景，無法保證強一致性。
D.en: Incorrect. Use AWS DataSync to perform continuous data synchronization between EC2 hosts in an Auto Scaling group. Error: AWS DataSync is mainly used for data migration or synchronization. It is not suitable for real-time shared storage scenarios and cannot guarantee strong consistency.

E.zh: 正確。建立 Amazon S3 儲存桶來儲存 Web 內容。將 Cache-Control 標頭元資料設定為 no-cache。使用 Amazon CloudFront 散佈內容。正確：Amazon S3 與 CloudFront 結合可以提供低延遲的內容分發。透過將Cache-Control設定為no-cache，可以確保內容更新立即生效，滿足強一致性要求。
E.en: Correct. Create an Amazon S3 bucket to store web content. Set the Cache-Control header metadata to no-cache. Use Amazon CloudFront to distribute content. Correct: Amazon S3 combined with CloudFront can provide low-latency content distribution. By setting Cache-Control to no-cache, you can ensure that content updates take effect immediately, meeting strong consistency requirements.

answer_text.zh: B. 建立 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) 檔案系統。在各個 EC2 執行個體上掛載 EFS 檔案系統。；E. 建立 Amazon S3 儲存桶來儲存 Web 內容。將 Cache-Control 標頭的元資料設定為 no-cache。使用 Amazon CloudFront 交付內容。
answer_text.en: B. Create an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system. Mount the EFS file system on the individual EC2 instances.; E. Create an Amazon S3 bucket to store the web content. Set the metadata for the Cache-Control header to no-cache. Use Amazon CloudFront to deliver the content.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：BE (91%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：建立 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) 檔案系統。將 EFS 檔案系統掛載到單一 EC2 執行個體上。正確：Amazon EFS 支援跨多個可用區共享文件，提供強一致性，適合內容頻繁更新的場景。；建立 Amazon S3 儲存桶來儲存 Web 內容。將 Cache-Control 標頭元資料設定為 no-cache。使用 Amazon CloudFront 散佈內容。正確：Amazon S3 與 CloudFront 結合可以提供低延遲的內容分發。透過將Cache-Control設定為no-cache，可以確保內容更新立即生效，滿足強一致性要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: BE (91%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Create an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system. Mount the EFS file system onto a single EC2 instance. Correct: Amazon EFS supports shared files across multiple availability zones, providing strong consistency and suitable for scenarios where content is frequently updated.; Create an Amazon S3 bucket to store web content. Set the Cache-Control header metadata to no-cache. Use Amazon CloudFront to distribute content. Correct: Amazon S3 combined with CloudFront can provide low-latency content distribution. By setting Cache-Control to no-cache, you can ensure that content updates take effect immediately, meeting strong consistency requirements.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在使用 Application Load Balancer 在三個 AWS 區域中部署應用程式。 Amazon Route 53 將用於在這些區域之間分配流量。解決方案架構師應使用哪一種 Route 53 配置來提供最高效能的體驗？
question_text.en: A company is deploying an application in three AWS Regions using an Application Load Balancer. Amazon Route 53 will be used to distribute traffic between these Regions. Which Route 53 configuration should a solutions architect use to provide the MOST high-performing experience?

A.zh: 建立具有延遲策略的 A 記錄。
A.en: Create an A record with a latency policy.

B.zh: 使用地理位置策略建立 A 記錄。
B.en: Create an A record with a geolocation policy.

C.zh: 建立具有故障轉移策略的 CNAME 記錄。
C.en: Create a CNAME record with a failover policy.

D.zh: 建立具有地理位置鄰近政策的 CNAME 記錄。
D.en: Create a CNAME record with a geoproximity policy.

A.zh: 正確。延遲路由策略將根據使用者與每個 AWS 區域之間的網路延遲來選擇最佳區域，以提供最佳效能。這是最適合高效能體驗的策略，因為它直接考慮網路延遲。正確的選項。
A.en: Correct. The delay routing policy will select the optimal region based on the network delay between the user and each AWS region to provide the best performance. This is the strategy best suited for a high-performance experience because it takes network latency directly into account. Correct option.

B.zh: 錯誤。地理位置路由從使用者的地理來源選擇端點，而不是測量的網路延遲，因此它不能始終提供效能最高的區域。
B.en: Incorrect. Geolocation routing selects endpoints from the user’s geographic origin rather than measured network latency, so it does not consistently provide the highest-performing Region.

C.zh: 錯誤。故障切換路由策略主要應用於高可用場景，當主資源無法使用時，將流量路由至備份資源。它的目標是提高可用性而不是優化效能，所以不適合這個問題。錯誤的選擇。
C.en: Incorrect. The failover routing strategy is mainly used in high-availability scenarios to route traffic to backup resources when the primary resource is unavailable. Its goal is to improve usability rather than optimize performance, so it is not suitable for this question. Wrong option.

D.zh: 錯誤。地理位置鄰近路由策略會根據使用者與資源的地理距離來路由流量，並允許調整首選項。雖然可以優化效能，但它需要額外的配置，並且不像延遲路由那樣直接以網路效能為目標。錯誤的選擇。
D.en: Incorrect. Geoproximity routing policies route traffic based on the user's geographic distance from the resource and allow for adjustments to preferences. While performance can be optimized, it requires additional configuration and does not target network performance as directly as deferred routing. Wrong option.

answer_text.zh: A. 建立具有延遲策略的 A 記錄。
answer_text.en: A. Create an A record with a latency policy.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (88%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：延遲路由策略將根據使用者與每個 AWS 區域之間的網路延遲來選擇最佳區域，以提供最佳效能。這是最適合高效能體驗的策略，因為它直接考慮網路延遲。正確的選項。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (88%). Popular discussion and key point summary: The delay routing policy will select the optimal region based on the network delay between the user and each AWS region to provide the best performance. This is the strategy best suited for a high-performance experience because it takes network latency directly into account. Correct option.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司有一個包含嵌入式 NoSQL 資料庫的 Web 應用程式。該應用程式在應用程式負載平衡器 (ALB) 後面的 Amazon EC2 執行個體上執行。這些執行個體在單一可用區的 Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling 群組中運作。最近流量的增加要求應用程式具有高可用性並且資料庫最終保持一致。哪種解決方案能夠以最少的營運開銷滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company has a web application that includes an embedded NoSQL database. The application runs on Amazon EC2 instances behind an Application Load Balancer (ALB). The instances run in an Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling group in a single Availability Zone. A recent increase in traffic requires the application to be highly available and for the database to be eventually consistent. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

A.zh: 將 ALB 替換為網路負載平衡器。在 EC2 執行個體上維護嵌入式 NoSQL 資料庫及其複製服務。
A.en: Replace the ALB with a Network Load Balancer. Maintain the embedded NoSQL database with its replication service on the EC2 instances.

B.zh: 將 ALB 替換為網路負載平衡器。使用 AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) 將嵌入式 NoSQL 資料庫移轉到 Amazon DynamoDB。
B.en: Replace the ALB with a Network Load Balancer. Migrate the embedded NoSQL database to Amazon DynamoDB by using AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS).

C.zh: 修改 Auto Scaling 群組以跨三個可用區使用 EC2 執行個體。在 EC2 執行個體上維護嵌入式 NoSQL 資料庫及其複製服務。
C.en: Modify the Auto Scaling group to use EC2 instances across three Availability Zones. Maintain the embedded NoSQL database with its replication service on the EC2 instances.

D.zh: 修改 Auto Scaling 群組以跨三個可用區使用 EC2 執行個體。使用 AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) 將嵌入式 NoSQL 資料庫移轉到 Amazon DynamoDB。
D.en: Modify the Auto Scaling group to use EC2 instances across three Availability Zones. Migrate the embedded NoSQL database to Amazon DynamoDB by using AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS).

A.zh: 錯誤。網路負載平衡器 (NLB) 適用於低延遲和 TCP/UDP 流量，但問題並未提及此功能的必要性。 ALB 更適合 HTTP/HTTPS 流量。錯誤：嵌入式NoSQL資料庫仍然運行在EC2執行個體上，無法實現高可用性，因為它依賴單一可用區。
A.en: Incorrect. Network Load Balancer (NLB) is suitable for low latency and TCP/UDP traffic, but the question does not mention the need for this feature. ALB is better suited for HTTP/HTTPS traffic. Error: The embedded NoSQL database still runs on an EC2 instance and cannot achieve high availability because it relies on a single Availability Zone.

B.zh: 錯誤。雖然遷移到DynamoDB是正確的方向，但用NLB取代ALB並不能滿足問題的要求。 ALB 更適合處理 Web 應用程式流量。正確：遷移到 DynamoDB 可實現高可用性和最終一致性。
B.en: Incorrect. Although migrating to DynamoDB is the right direction, replacing ALB with NLB does not meet the requirements of the question. ALB is better suited for handling web application traffic. Correct: Moving to DynamoDB enables high availability and eventual consistency.

C.zh: 錯誤。跨三個可用區的 Auto Scaling 群組可以提高 EC2 執行個體的高可用性。錯誤：嵌入式 NoSQL 資料庫仍在 EC2 執行個體上執行，增加了操作複雜性並且未充分利用託管服務。
C.en: Incorrect. Auto Scaling groups across three Availability Zones can increase the high availability of EC2 instances. Error: Embedded NoSQL databases still run on EC2 instances, adding operational complexity and not taking full advantage of managed services.

D.zh: 正確。跨三個可用區的 Auto Scaling 群組可以提高 EC2 執行個體的高可用性。正確：遷移至 DynamoDB 可實現高可用性和最終一致性，同時減少營運開銷。
D.en: Correct. Auto Scaling groups across three Availability Zones can increase the high availability of EC2 instances. Correct: Moving to DynamoDB enables high availability and eventual consistency while reducing operational overhead.

answer_text.zh: D. 修改 Auto Scaling 群組以跨三個可用區使用 EC2 執行個體。使用 AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) 將嵌入式 NoSQL 資料庫移轉到 Amazon DynamoDB。
answer_text.en: D. Modify the Auto Scaling group to use EC2 instances across three Availability Zones. Migrate the embedded NoSQL database to Amazon DynamoDB by using AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS).

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：跨三個可用區的 Auto Scaling 群組可以提高 EC2 執行個體的高可用性。正確：遷移至 DynamoDB 可實現高可用性和最終一致性，同時減少營運開銷。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Auto Scaling groups across three Availability Zones can increase the high availability of EC2 instances. Correct: Moving to DynamoDB enables high availability and eventual consistency while reducing operational overhead.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在 AWS 上建立購物應用程式。該應用程式提供的目錄每月更改一次，並且需要根據流量進行擴展。該公司希望應用程式的延遲盡可能低。來自每個用戶購物車的數據需要具有高可用性。即使用戶斷開連接並重新連接，用戶會話資料也必須可用。解決方案架構師應該怎麼做才能確保始終保留購物車資料？
question_text.en: A company is building a shopping application on AWS. The application offers a catalog that changes once each month and needs to scale with traffic volume. The company wants the lowest possible latency from the application. Data from each user's shopping cart needs to be highly available. User session data must be available even if the user is disconnected and reconnects. What should a solutions architect do to ensure that the shopping cart data is preserved at all times?

A.zh: 設定應用程式負載平衡器以啟用黏性會話功能（會話關聯性）以存取 Amazon Aurora 中的目錄。
A.en: Configure an Application Load Balancer to enable the sticky sessions feature (session affinity) for access to the catalog in Amazon Aurora.

B.zh: 設定 Amazon ElastiCache for Redis 以快取來自 Amazon DynamoDB 的目錄資料和來自使用者會話的購物車資料。
B.en: Configure Amazon ElastiCache for Redis to cache catalog data from Amazon DynamoDB and shopping cart data from the user's session.

C.zh: 設定 Amazon OpenSearch Service 以快取來自 Amazon DynamoDB 的目錄資料和來自使用者會話的購物車資料。
C.en: Configure Amazon OpenSearch Service to cache catalog data from Amazon DynamoDB and shopping cart data from the user's session.

D.zh: 使用 Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) 儲存配置 Amazon EC2 執行個體來儲存目錄和購物車。配置自動快照。
D.en: Configure an Amazon EC2 instance with Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) storage for the catalog and shopping cart. Configure automated snapshots.

A.zh: 錯誤。ALB 黏性僅將使用者路由至相同目標，且不會持久儲存購物車狀態。因此，重新連線或目標失敗可能會遺失會話資料。
A.en: Incorrect. ALB stickiness only routes a user to the same target and does not durably store cart state. A reconnect or target failure can therefore lose session data.

B.zh: 正確。原因：Amazon ElastiCache for Redis 提供低延遲快取服務，適合儲存頻繁存取的目錄資料和使用者會話資料。 Amazon DynamoDB 提供高可用性和持久性，可用作汽車購買資料的後端儲存。這種架構不僅滿足了低延遲的要求，還保證了資料的持久性和高可用性。
B.en: Correct. reason: Amazon ElastiCache for Redis provides a low-latency caching service, suitable for storing frequently accessed directory data and user session data. Amazon DynamoDB provides high availability and durability and can be used as the backend storage for car purchase data. This architecture not only meets the low latency requirements, but also ensures data persistence and high availability.

C.zh: 錯誤。原因：Amazon OpenSearch Service 主要用於搜尋和分析，不適合用作快取服務。其延遲比較高，無條件滿足最低延遲要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Reason: Amazon OpenSearch Service is mainly used for search and analysis and is not suitable for use as a caching service. Its latency is relatively high and unconditional meets the minimum latency requirement.

D.zh: 錯誤。原因：雖然使用EC2和EBS儲存資料可以實現持久化，但條帶化並不能滿足低延遲和高可用性的要求。在這種方法之外，EC2執行個體需要手動管理以進行擴展，並且沒有條帶可以自動適應流量變化。
D.en: Incorrect. Reason: Although using EC2 and EBS to store data can achieve durability, striping does not meet the requirements of low latency and high availability. Outside the this approach, EC2 instances need to be manually managed for expansion, and no stripes can automatically adapt to traffic changes.

answer_text.zh: B. 設定 Amazon ElastiCache for Redis 以快取來自 Amazon DynamoDB 的目錄資料和來自使用者會話的購物車資料。
answer_text.en: B. Configure Amazon ElastiCache for Redis to cache catalog data from Amazon DynamoDB and shopping cart data from the user's session.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：原因：Amazon ElastiCache for Redis 提供低延遲快取服務，適合儲存頻繁存取的目錄資料和使用者會話資料。 Amazon DynamoDB 提供高可用性和持久性，可用作汽車購買資料的後端儲存。這種架構不僅滿足了低延遲的要求，還保證了資料的持久性和高可用性。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: reason: Amazon ElastiCache for Redis provides a low-latency caching service, suitable for storing frequently accessed directory data and user session data. Amazon DynamoDB provides high availability and durability and can be used as the backend storage for car purchase data. This architecture not only meets the low latency requirements, but also ensures data persistence and high availability.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在建立一個基於微服務的應用程序，該應用程式將部署在 Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) 上。微服務將相互互動。該公司希望確保應用程式可觀察，以便將來識別效能問題。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company is building a microservices-based application that will be deployed on Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS). The microservices will interact with each other. The company wants to ensure that the application is observable to identify performance issues in the future. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 將應用程式設定為使用 Amazon ElastiCache 來減少傳送至微服務的請求數量。
A.en: Configure the application to use Amazon ElastiCache to reduce the number of requests that are sent to the microservices.

B.zh: 設定 Amazon CloudWatch Container Insights 以從 EKS 叢集收集指標。配置 AWS X-Ray 以追蹤微服務之間的請求。
B.en: Configure Amazon CloudWatch Container Insights to collect metrics from the EKS clusters. Configure AWS X-Ray to trace the requests between the microservices.

C.zh: 設定 AWS CloudTrail 以查看 API 呼叫。建立 Amazon QuickSight 儀錶板來觀察微服務互動。
C.en: Configure AWS CloudTrail to review the API calls. Build an Amazon QuickSight dashboard to observe the microservice interactions.

D.zh: 使用 AWS Trusted Advisor 了解應用程式的效能。
D.en: Use AWS Trusted Advisor to understand the performance of the application.

A.zh: 錯誤。設定 Amazon ElastiCache 以減少傳送至微服務的請求數量。錯誤：ElastiCache主要用於快取資料以提高應用程式效能，但它不提供微服務之間的可觀察性或效能監控能力。
A.en: Incorrect. Configure Amazon ElastiCache to reduce the number of requests sent to your microservices. Error: ElastiCache is primarily used to cache data to improve application performance, but it does not provide observability or performance monitoring capabilities between microservices.

B.zh: 正確。此選項正確：CloudWatch Container Insights 可以收集 EKS 叢集的效能指標，AWS X-Ray 可以追蹤微服務之間的請求流，提供詳細的可觀察性。這是滿足問題要求的最佳解決方案。
B.en: Correct. Configure Amazon CloudWatch Container Insights to collect metrics from your EKS cluster. Configure AWS X-Ray to trace requests between microservices. Correct: CloudWatch Container Insights can collect performance metrics of EKS clusters, and AWS X-Ray can track the flow of requests between microservices, providing detailed observability. This is the best solution to meet the requirements of the question.

C.zh: 錯誤。設定 AWS CloudTrail 以審核 API 呼叫。建立 Amazon QuickSight 儀錶板來觀察微服務互動。錯誤：CloudTrail主要用於記錄API呼叫日誌，QuickSight用於資料視覺化，但它們無法直接提供微服務效能監控或請求追蹤功能。
C.en: Incorrect. Configure AWS CloudTrail to audit API calls. Build an Amazon QuickSight dashboard to observe microservice interactions. Error: CloudTrail is mainly used to record API call logs, and QuickSight is used for data visualization, but they cannot directly provide microservice performance monitoring or request tracking functions.

D.zh: 錯誤。使用 AWS Trusted Advisor 了解應用程式效能。錯誤：Trusted Advisor 主要用於提供成本優化、安全、容錯等建議，但不適合微服務的效能監控或請求追蹤。
D.en: Incorrect. Use AWS Trusted Advisor to understand application performance. Error: Trusted Advisor is mainly used to provide cost optimization, security, fault tolerance, etc. recommendations, but it is not suitable for performance monitoring or request tracking of microservices.

answer_text.zh: B. 設定 Amazon CloudWatch Container Insights 以從 EKS 叢集收集指標。配置 AWS X-Ray 以追蹤微服務之間的請求。
answer_text.en: B. Configure Amazon CloudWatch Container Insights to collect metrics from the EKS clusters. Configure AWS X-Ray to trace the requests between the microservices.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：此選項正確：CloudWatch Container Insights 可以收集 EKS 叢集的效能指標，AWS X-Ray 可以追蹤微服務之間的請求流，提供詳細的可觀察性。這是滿足問題要求的最佳解決方案。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Configure Amazon CloudWatch Container Insights to collect metrics from your EKS cluster. Configure AWS X-Ray to trace requests between microservices. Correct: CloudWatch Container Insights can collect performance metrics of EKS clusters, and AWS X-Ray can track the flow of requests between microservices, providing detailed observability. This is the best solution to meet the requirements of the question.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 公司需要為客戶提供對其資料的安全存取。該公司處理客戶資料並將結果儲存在 Amazon S3 儲存桶中。所有資料都受到嚴格的法規和安全要求的約束。資料必須靜態加密。每個客戶必須只能從其 AWS 帳戶存取自己的資料。公司員工不得存取資料。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company needs to provide customers with secure access to its data. The company processes customer data and stores the results in an Amazon S3 bucket. All the data is subject to strong regulations and security requirements. The data must be encrypted at rest. Each customer must be able to access only their data from their AWS account. Company employees must not be able to access the data. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 為每位客戶預置 AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) 憑證。加密客戶端資料。在私有憑證策略中，拒絕除客戶提供的 IAM 角色之外的所有委託人對憑證的存取。
A.en: Provision an AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) certificate for each customer. Encrypt the data client-side. In the private certificate policy, deny access to the certificate for all principals except an IAM role that the customer provides.

B.zh: 為每個客戶配置單獨的 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 金鑰。對資料伺服器端進行加密。在 S3 儲存桶策略中，拒絕對客戶提供的 IAM 角色之外的所有委託人的資料進行解密。
B.en: Provision a separate AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) key for each customer. Encrypt the data server-side. In the S3 bucket policy, deny decryption of data for all principals except an IAM role that the customer provides.

C.zh: 為每個客戶配置單獨的 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 金鑰。對資料伺服器端進行加密。在每個 KMS 金鑰策略中，拒絕對客戶提供的 IAM 角色之外的所有委託人的資料進行解密。
C.en: Provision a separate AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) key for each customer. Encrypt the data server-side. In each KMS key policy, deny decryption of data for all principals except an IAM role that the customer provides.

D.zh: 為每位客戶預置 AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) 憑證。加密客戶端資料。在公共憑證策略中，拒絕除客戶提供的 IAM 角色之外的所有委託人對憑證的存取。
D.en: Provision an AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) certificate for each customer. Encrypt the data client-side. In the public certificate policy, deny access to the certificate for all principals except an IAM role that the customer provides.

A.zh: 錯誤。ACM 主要用於管理 SSL/TLS 證書，而不是加密 S3 資料。此選項所提及的「客戶端加密」與 ACM 的功能不符。錯誤：ACM 憑證不直接控制對 S3 資料的存取。
A.en: Incorrect. ACM is primarily used to manage SSL/TLS certificates, not to encrypt S3 data. The "client-side encryption" mentioned by this option does not match the capabilities of ACM. Error: ACM certificates do not directly control access to S3 data.

B.zh: 錯誤。使用 AWS KMS 金鑰進行伺服器端加密是正確的方法。錯誤：S3 儲存桶策略主要用於控制對 S3 儲存桶的訪問，而不是直接管理 KMS 金鑰的解密權限。解密權限應透過KMS金鑰策略進行管理。
B.en: Incorrect. using AWS KMS keys for server-side encryption is the correct approach. Error: S3 bucket policy is primarily used to control access to S3 buckets, not to directly manage decryption permissions for KMS keys. Decryption permissions should be managed through KMS key policies.

C.zh: 正確。為每個用戶端配置單獨的 KMS 金鑰並使用伺服器端加密以滿足問題要求。正確：透過 KMS 金鑰策略控制解密權限是確保只有客戶提供的 IAM 角色才能解密資料的最佳實務。
C.en: Correct. Configure separate KMS keys for each client and use server-side encryption to comply with the question requirements. Correct: Controlling decryption permissions through KMS key policies is a best practice to ensure that only customer-provided IAM roles can decrypt data.

D.zh: 錯誤。ACM 證書用於管理 SSL/TLS 證書，與 S3 資料加密無關。錯誤：「公共憑證策略」不是AWS中的概念，不符合問題要求。
D.en: Incorrect. ACM certificates are used to manage SSL/TLS certificates and have nothing to do with S3 data encryption. Error: "Public certificate policy" is not a concept in AWS and does not meet the question requirements.

answer_text.zh: C. 為每個客戶配置單獨的 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 金鑰。對資料伺服器端進行加密。在每個 KMS 金鑰策略中，拒絕對客戶提供的 IAM 角色之外的所有委託人的資料進行解密。
answer_text.en: C. Provision a separate AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) key for each customer. Encrypt the data server-side. In each KMS key policy, deny decryption of data for all principals except an IAM role that the customer provides.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (75%)； B (25%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：為每個用戶端配置單獨的 KMS 金鑰並使用伺服器端加密以滿足問題要求。正確：透過 KMS 金鑰策略控制解密權限是確保只有客戶提供的 IAM 角色才能解密資料的最佳實務。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (75%); B (25%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Configure separate KMS keys for each client and use server-side encryption to comply with the question requirements. Correct: Controlling decryption permissions through KMS key policies is a best practice to ensure that only customer-provided IAM roles can decrypt data.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 解決方案架構師建立一個包含兩個公有子網路和兩個私有子網路的 VPC。公司安全要求要求解決方案架構師在私有子網路中啟動所有 Amazon EC2 執行個體。但是，當解決方案架構師啟動在私有子網路中的連接埠 80 和 443 上執行 Web 伺服器的 EC2 執行個體時，沒有外部 Internet 流量可以連線到該伺服器。解決方案架構師應該做什麼來解決這個問題？
question_text.en: A solutions architect creates a VPC that includes two public subnets and two private subnets. A corporate security mandate requires the solutions architect to launch all Amazon EC2 instances in a private subnet. However, when the solutions architect launches an EC2 instance that runs a web server on ports 80 and 443 in a private subnet, no external internet traffic can connect to the server. What should the solutions architect do to resolve this issue?

A.zh: 將 EC2 執行個體附加到私有子網路中的 Auto Scaling 群組。確保網站的 DNS 記錄解析為 Auto Scaling 群組識別碼。
A.en: Attach the EC2 instance to an Auto Scaling group in a private subnet. Ensure that the DNS record for the website resolves to the Auto Scaling group identifier.

B.zh: 在公用子網路中設定面向網際網路的應用程式負載平衡器 (ALB)。將 EC2 執行個體新增至與 ALB 關聯的目標群組確保網站的 DNS 記錄解析為 ALB。
B.en: Provision an internet-facing Application Load Balancer (ALB) in a public subnet. Add the EC2 instance to the target group that is associated with the ALEnsure that the DNS record for the website resolves to the ALB.

C.zh: 在私有子網路中啟動 NAT 閘道。更新私有子網路的路由表以新增至 NAT 閘道的預設路由。將公有彈性 IP 位址附加到 NAT 閘道。
C.en: Launch a NAT gateway in a private subnet. Update the route table for the private subnets to add a default route to the NAT gateway. Attach a public Elastic IP address to the NAT gateway.

D.zh: 確保附加到 EC2 執行個體的安全性群組允許連接埠 80 上的 HTTP 流量和連接埠 443 上的 HTTPS 流量。確保網站的 DNS 記錄解析為 EC2 執行個體的公用 IP 位址。
D.en: Ensure that the security group that is attached to the EC2 instance allows HTTP traffic on port 80 and HTTPS traffic on port 443. Ensure that the DNS record for the website resolves to the public IP address of the EC2 instance.

A.zh: 錯誤。Auto Scaling群組的主要功能是自動擴充執行個體數量，解決高可用和彈性問題，而不是解決私有子網路中的執行個體無法接收外部流量的問題。另外，Auto Scaling 群組識別碼不能直接用作 DNS 記錄解析目標。
A.en: Incorrect. The main function of the Auto Scaling group is to automatically expand and reduce the number of instances to solve the problem of high availability and elasticity, rather than to solve the problem of instances in the private subnet being unable to receive external traffic. In addition, Auto Scaling group identifiers cannot be directly used as DNS record resolution targets.

B.zh: 正確。ALB 可以部署在公有子網路中，並且可以將流量轉送到私有子網路中的 EC2 執行個體。這滿足安全要求，同時允許外部流量存取私有子網路中的執行個體。 DNS解析為ALB的位址是正確的設定方法。
B.en: Correct. ALBs can be deployed in public subnets and can forward traffic to EC2 instances in private subnets. This meets security requirements while allowing external traffic to access instances in the private subnet. DNS resolution to the address of the ALB is the correct configuration method.

C.zh: 錯誤。NAT閘道的主要功能是允許私有子網路中的執行個體存取外部Internet（例如下載更新和存取API），而不是接收外部流量。此選項無法解決外部流量無法連接到私有子網路中的執行個體的問題。
C.en: Incorrect. The main function of the NAT gateway is to allow instances in the private subnet to access the external Internet (such as downloading updates and accessing APIs), rather than receiving external traffic. This option does not resolve the issue where external traffic cannot connect to instances in private subnets.

D.zh: 錯誤。私有子網路中的執行個體無法直接指派公有 IP 位址，因此無法透過公有 IP 位址接收外部流量。此外，此組態違反了「所有 EC2 執行個體必須部署在私有子網路中」問題中所要求的安全性規定。
D.en: Incorrect. Instances in a private subnet cannot be directly assigned a public IP address and therefore cannot receive external traffic through the public IP address. In addition, this configuration violates the security regulations required in the question that "all EC2 instances must be deployed in private subnets".

answer_text.zh: B. 在公用子網路中設定面向網際網路的應用程式負載平衡器 (ALB)。將 EC2 執行個體新增至與 ALB 關聯的目標群組確保網站的 DNS 記錄解析為 ALB。
answer_text.en: B. Provision an internet-facing Application Load Balancer (ALB) in a public subnet. Add the EC2 instance to the target group that is associated with the ALEnsure that the DNS record for the website resolves to the ALB.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (84%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：ALB 可以部署在公有子網路中，並且可以將流量轉送到私有子網路中的 EC2 執行個體。這滿足安全要求，同時允許外部流量存取私有子網路中的執行個體。 DNS解析為ALB的位址是正確的設定方法。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (84%). Popular discussion and key point summary: ALBs can be deployed in public subnets and can forward traffic to EC2 instances in private subnets. This meets security requirements while allowing external traffic to access instances in the private subnet. DNS resolution to the address of the ALB is the correct configuration method.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在使用 AWS Fargate 叢集將新應用程式部署到 Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS)。應用程式需要一個儲存解決方案來實現資料持久化。此解決方案必須具有高可用性和容錯能力。該解決方案還必須在多個應用程式容器之間共用。哪種解決方案能夠以最少的營運開銷滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company is deploying a new application to Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) with an AWS Fargate cluster. The application needs a storage solution for data persistence. The solution must be highly available and fault tolerant. The solution also must be shared between multiple application containers. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

A.zh: 在放置 EKS 工作執行緒節點的相同可用區中建立 Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) 磁碟區。在 EKS 叢集上的 StorageClass 物件中註冊磁碟區。使用EBS Multi-Attach在容器之間共用資料。
A.en: Create Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volumes in the same Availability Zones where EKS worker nodes are placed. Register the volumes in a StorageClass object on an EKS cluster. Use EBS Multi-Attach to share the data between containers.

B.zh: 建立 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) 檔案系統。在 EKS 叢集上的 StorageClass 物件中註冊檔案系統。對所有容器使用相同的檔案系統。
B.en: Create an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system. Register the file system in a StorageClass object on an EKS cluster. Use the same file system for all containers.

C.zh: 建立 Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) 磁碟區。在 EKS 叢集上的 StorageClass 物件中註冊磁碟區。所有容器使用相同的體積。
C.en: Create an Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volume. Register the volume in a StorageClass object on an EKS cluster. Use the same volume for all containers.

D.zh: 在放置 EKS 工作執行緒節點的相同可用區中建立 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) 檔案系統。在 EKS 叢集上的 StorageClass 物件中註冊檔案系統。建立 AWS Lambda 函數以在檔案系統之間同步資料。
D.en: Create Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file systems in the same Availability Zones where EKS worker nodes are placed. Register the file systems in a StorageClass object on an EKS cluster. Create an AWS Lambda function to synchronize the data between file systems.

A.zh: 錯誤。Amazon EBS 是一種區塊儲存服務，主要用於滿足單一執行個體的儲存需求。 EBS Multi-Attach 允許多個 EC2 執行個體掛載同一 EBS 卷，但不支援 Fargate。另外，EBS的可用性僅限於單一可用區，無法滿足容器間高可用和共享儲存的需求。錯誤原因：不支援Fargate，無法跨可用區實現高可用性。
A.en: Incorrect. Amazon EBS is a block storage service primarily used for the storage needs of a single instance. EBS Multi-Attach allows multiple EC2 instances to mount the same EBS volume, but does not support Fargate. In addition, the availability of EBS is limited to a single availability zone and cannot meet the needs of high availability and shared storage between containers. Reason for the error: Fargate is not supported and high availability cannot be achieved across Availability Zones.

B.zh: 正確。Amazon EFS 是一種檔案儲存服務，支援跨多個可用區的容器之間的高可用性和共用儲存。 EFS 可以透過 StorageClass 物件輕鬆整合到 EKS 叢集中，並支援 Fargate。由於 EFS 是一項託管服務，用戶無需管理底層基礎設施，因此營運開銷較低。正確原因：滿足高可用性、容器之間的共享儲存要求以及最小的營運開銷。
B.en: Correct. Amazon EFS is a file storage service that supports high availability and shared storage between containers across multiple Availability Zones. EFS can be easily integrated into an EKS cluster through the StorageClass object and supports Fargate. Operational overhead is low because EFS is a managed service and users do not need to manage the underlying infrastructure. Correct Reasons: Meets high availability, shared storage requirements between containers, and minimal operational overhead.

C.zh: 錯誤。與選項 A 類似，EBS 是一種區塊儲存服務，主要用於滿足單一實例儲存需求。單一 EBS 磁碟區無法在多個容器之間共用，且不支援 Fargate。另外，EBS的可用性僅限於單一可用區，無法滿足高可用性要求。錯誤原因：不支援Fargate，無法跨容器共用儲存。
C.en: Incorrect. Similar to option A, EBS is a block storage service primarily intended for single-instance storage needs. A single EBS volume cannot be shared across multiple containers and Fargate is not supported. In addition, the availability of EBS is limited to a single availability zone and cannot meet high availability requirements. Reason for the error: Fargate is not supported and storage cannot be shared across containers.

D.zh: 錯誤。建立多個 EFS 檔案系統並使用 Lambda 同步資料會增加操作開銷。 EFS本身已經支援跨可用區的高可用性，無需額外的同步機制。此選項比較複雜，且不符合「最小營運開銷」的要求。錯誤原因：增加了不必要的複雜性和營運開銷。
D.en: Incorrect. Creating multiple EFS file systems and using Lambda to synchronize data increases operational overhead. EFS itself already supports high availability across availability zones without the need for additional synchronization mechanisms. This option is more complex and does not meet the "minimum operational overhead" requirement. Reason for error: Added unnecessary complexity and operational overhead.

answer_text.zh: B. 建立 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) 檔案系統。在 EKS 叢集上的 StorageClass 物件中註冊檔案系統。對所有容器使用相同的檔案系統。
answer_text.en: B. Create an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system. Register the file system in a StorageClass object on an EKS cluster. Use the same file system for all containers.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Amazon EFS 是一種檔案儲存服務，支援跨多個可用區的容器之間的高可用性和共用儲存。 EFS 可以透過 StorageClass 物件輕鬆整合到 EKS 叢集中，並支援 Fargate。由於 EFS 是一項託管服務，用戶無需管理底層基礎設施，因此營運開銷較低。正確原因：滿足高可用性、容器之間的共享儲存要求以及最小的營運開銷。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon EFS is a file storage service that supports high availability and shared storage between containers across multiple Availability Zones. EFS can be easily integrated into an EKS cluster through the StorageClass object and supports Fargate. Operational overhead is low because EFS is a managed service and users do not need to manage the underlying infrastructure. Correct Reasons: Meets high availability, shared storage requirements between containers, and minimal operational overhead.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司有一個在其本地資料中心使用 Docker 容器的應用程式。該應用程式在容器主機上運行，該容器主機將持久性資料儲存在主機上的磁碟區中。容器實例使用儲存的持久性資料。該公司希望將應用程式轉移到完全託管的服務，因為該公司不想管理任何伺服器或儲存基礎設施。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company has an application that uses Docker containers in its local data center. The application runs on a container host that stores persistent data in a volume on the host. The container instances use the stored persistent data. The company wants to move the application to a fully managed service because the company does not want to manage any servers or storage infrastructure. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 將 Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) 與自我管理節點結合使用。建立附加到 Amazon EC2 執行個體的 Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) 磁碟區。使用 EBS 磁碟區作為安裝在容器中的持久性磁碟區。
A.en: Use Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) with self-managed nodes. Create an Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volume attached to an Amazon EC2 instance. Use the EBS volume as a persistent volume mounted in the containers.

B.zh: 將 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 與 AWS Fargate 啟動類型結合使用。建立 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) 磁碟區。新增 EFS 磁碟區作為安裝在容器中的持久性儲存磁碟區。
B.en: Use Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) with an AWS Fargate launch type. Create an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) volume. Add the EFS volume as a persistent storage volume mounted in the containers.

C.zh: 將 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 與 AWS Fargate 啟動類型結合使用。建立 Amazon S3 儲存桶。將 S3 儲存桶對應為安裝在容器中的持久性儲存磁碟區。
C.en: Use Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) with an AWS Fargate launch type. Create an Amazon S3 bucket. Map the S3 bucket as a persistent storage volume mounted in the containers.

D.zh: 將 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 與 Amazon EC2 啟動類型結合使用。建立 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) 磁碟區。新增 EFS 磁碟區作為安裝在容器中的持久性儲存磁碟區。
D.en: Use Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) with an Amazon EC2 launch type. Create an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) volume. Add the EFS volume as a persistent storage volume mounted in the containers.

A.zh: 錯誤。雖然EKS支援容器編排，但使用EKS和自管節點需要管理EC2執行個體和EBS卷，這不符合問題所要求的「完全託管服務」。
A.en: Incorrect. Although EKS supports container orchestration, using EKS and self-managed nodes requires managing EC2 instances and EBS volumes, which does not meet the "fully managed service" required by the question.

B.zh: 正確。AWS Fargate 是一種完全託管的無伺服器容器執行時間，無需管理底層伺服器。 EFS是完全託管的文件儲存服務，支援持久化存儲，適合掛載到容器中。
B.en: Correct. AWS Fargate is a serverless container runtime that is fully managed and requires no management of the underlying server. EFS is a fully managed file storage service that supports persistent storage and is suitable for mounting into containers.

C.zh: 錯誤。雖然S3是完全託管的存儲服務，但它是對象存儲，不適合直接掛載為容器的持久存儲卷。
C.en: Incorrect. Although S3 is a fully managed storage service, it is object storage and is not suitable for mounting directly as a container's persistent storage volume.

D.zh: 錯誤。使用EC2啟動類型需要管理底層伺服器，這不符合問題的「完全託管服務」要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Using the EC2 startup type requires management of the underlying server, which does not meet the "fully managed service" requirement of the question.

answer_text.zh: B. 將 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 與 AWS Fargate 啟動類型結合使用。建立 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) 磁碟區。新增 EFS 磁碟區作為安裝在容器中的持久性儲存磁碟區。
answer_text.en: B. Use Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) with an AWS Fargate launch type. Create an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) volume. Add the EFS volume as a persistent storage volume mounted in the containers.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (92%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：AWS Fargate 是一種完全託管的無伺服器容器執行時間，無需管理底層伺服器。 EFS是完全託管的文件儲存服務，支援持久化存儲，適合掛載到容器中。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (92%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS Fargate is a serverless container runtime that is fully managed and requires no management of the underlying server. EFS is a fully managed file storage service that supports persistent storage and is suitable for mounting into containers.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家遊戲公司希望在多個 AWS 區域推出新的面向網際網路的應用程式。應用程式將使用 TCP 和 UDP 協定進行通訊。公司需要為全球用戶提供高可用性和最小延遲。解決方案架構師應該採取哪些操作組合來滿足這些要求？ （選兩個。）
question_text.en: A gaming company wants to launch a new internet-facing application in multiple AWS Regions. The application will use the TCP and UDP protocols for communication. The company needs to provide high availability and minimum latency for global users. Which combination of actions should a solutions architect take to meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 在每個區域中的應用程式前面建立內部網路負載平衡器。
A.en: Create internal Network Load Balancers in front of the application in each Region.

B.zh: 在每個區域中的應用程式前面建立外部應用程式負載平衡器。
B.en: Create external Application Load Balancers in front of the application in each Region.

C.zh: 建立 AWS Global Accelerator 加速器以將流量路由到每個區域中的負載平衡器。
C.en: Create an AWS Global Accelerator accelerator to route traffic to the load balancers in each Region.

D.zh: 設定 Amazon Route 53 以使用地理位置路由原則來指派流量。
D.en: Configure Amazon Route 53 to use a geolocation routing policy to distribute the traffic.

E.zh: 設定 Amazon CloudFront 以處理流量並將請求路由到每個區域中的應用程式
E.en: Configure Amazon CloudFront to handle the traffic and route requests to the application in each Region

A.zh: 正確。內部網路負載平衡器專為內部流量而設計，無法處理 Internet 流量。題目要求「Internet面臨的應用」，因此該選項不符合要求。
A.en: Correct. The internal Network Load Balancer is designed for internal traffic and cannot handle Internet traffic. The topic requires "Applications faced by the Internet", so this option does not meet the requirements.

B.zh: 錯誤。雖然Application Load Balancer可以處理Internet流量，但它主要用於HTTP/HTTPS協議，且問題明確提到需要支援TCP和UDP協定。該選項不符合題目要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Although Application Load Balancer can handle Internet traffic, it is mainly used for HTTP/HTTPS protocols, and the question clearly mentions the need to support TCP and UDP protocols. This option does not meet the question requirements.

C.zh: 正確。AWS Global Accelerator 提供全域流量最佳化，支援 TCP 和 UDP 協議，並且可以將流量路由到每個區域的負載平衡器，以滿足高可用性和低延遲的要求。
C.en: Correct. AWS Global Accelerator provides global traffic optimization, supports TCP and UDP protocols, and can route traffic to load balancers in each region to meet high availability and low latency requirements.

D.zh: 錯誤。雖然 Route 53 的地理位置路由可以分配流量，但它不會最佳化 TCP 和 UDP 協定的效能，也不會提供 Global Accelerator 等低延遲和高可用性功能。
D.en: Incorrect. While Route 53's geo-location routing can distribute traffic, it does not optimize the performance of TCP and UDP protocols or provide low-latency and high-availability features like Global Accelerator.

E.zh: 錯誤。CloudFront 是一個內容傳遞網路 (CDN)，主要用於快取和分發靜態內容。它不適合直接處理 TCP 和 UDP 流量。
E.en: Incorrect. CloudFront is a content delivery network (CDN), mainly used for caching and delivering static content. It is not suitable for handling TCP and UDP traffic directly.

answer_text.zh: A. 在每個區域中的應用程式前面建立內部網路負載平衡器。；C. 建立 AWS Global Accelerator 加速器以將流量路由到每個區域中的負載平衡器。
answer_text.en: A. Create internal Network Load Balancers in front of the application in each Region.; C. Create an AWS Global Accelerator accelerator to route traffic to the load balancers in each Region.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：AC (89%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：內部網路負載平衡器專為內部流量而設計，無法處理 Internet 流量。題目要求「Internet面臨的應用」，因此該選項不符合要求。；AWS Global Accelerator 提供全域流量最佳化，支援 TCP 和 UDP 協議，並且可以將流量路由到每個區域的負載平衡器，以滿足高可用性和低延遲的要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: AC (89%). Popular discussion and key point summary: The internal Network Load Balancer is designed for internal traffic and cannot handle Internet traffic. The topic requires "Applications faced by the Internet", so this option does not meet the requirements.; AWS Global Accelerator provides global traffic optimization, supports TCP and UDP protocols, and can route traffic to load balancers in each region to meet high availability and low latency requirements.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 某個城市部署了一個在應用程式負載平衡器 (ALB) 後面的 Amazon EC2 執行個體上執行的 Web 應用程式。該應用程式的用戶報告了零星的效能問題，這似乎與源自隨機 IP 位址的 DDoS 攻擊有關。該城市需要一種需要最少配置更改並為 D​​DoS 來源提供審核追蹤的解決方案。哪種解決方案滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A city has deployed a web application running on Amazon EC2 instances behind an Application Load Balancer (ALB). The application's users have reported sporadic performance, which appears to be related to DDoS attacks originating from random IP addresses. The city needs a solution that requires minimal configuration changes and provides an audit trail for the DDoS sources. Which solution meets these requirements?

A.zh: 在 ALB 上啟用 AWS WAF Web ACL，並設定規則以封鎖來自未知來源的流量。
A.en: Enable an AWS WAF web ACL on the ALB, and configure rules to block traffic from unknown sources.

B.zh: 訂閱 Amazon Inspector。與 AWS DDoS 回應團隊 (DRT) 合作，將緩解控制措施整合到服務中。
B.en: Subscribe to Amazon Inspector. Engage the AWS DDoS Response Team (DRT) to integrate mitigating controls into the service.

C.zh: 訂閱 AWS Shield Advanced。與 AWS DDoS 回應團隊 (DRT) 合作，將緩解控制措施整合到服務中。
C.en: Subscribe to AWS Shield Advanced. Engage the AWS DDoS Response Team (DRT) to integrate mitigating controls into the service.

D.zh: 為應用程式建立 Amazon CloudFront 分配，並將 ALB 設定為來源。在分配上啟用 AWS WAF Web ACL，並配置規則以封鎖來自未知來源的流量
D.en: Create an Amazon CloudFront distribution for the application, and set the ALB as the origin. Enable an AWS WAF web ACL on the distribution, and configure rules to block traffic from unknown sources

A.zh: 錯誤。效能分析：AWS WAF可以幫助過濾惡意流量，但需要手動設定規則來識別和阻止DDoS攻擊來源，可能無法有效應對來自隨機IP位址的攻擊。此外，AWS WAF本身並未提供專用的DDoS防護功能。此選項不符合問題的要求，因為它無法提供全面的DDoS防護，並且沒有提到審計功能。
A.en: Incorrect. Performance analysis: AWS WAF can help filter malicious traffic, but it requires manual configuration of rules to identify and block DDoS attack sources, which may not effectively deal with attacks from random IP addresses. In addition, AWS WAF itself does not provide dedicated DDoS protection capabilities. This option does not meet the requirements of the question because it cannot provide comprehensive DDoS protection and does not mention auditing functions.

B.zh: 錯誤。分析：Amazon Inspector 是一項安全評估服務，用於偵測漏洞和設定問題，與 DDoS 防護無關。此選項中提到的 AWS DDoS 回應團隊 (DRT) 確實可以提供協助，但 Amazon Inspector 並不是 DDoS 防護的正確工具。此選項是錯誤的，因為 Amazon Inspector 不適合 DDoS 保護場景。
B.en: Incorrect. Analysis: Amazon Inspector is a security assessment service used to detect vulnerabilities and configuration issues, and has nothing to do with DDoS protection. The AWS DDoS Response Team (DRT) mentioned in this option can indeed assist, but Amazon Inspector is not the right tool for DDoS protection. This option is wrong because Amazon Inspector is not suitable for DDoS protection scenarios.

C.zh: 正確。效能分析：AWS Shield Advanced 是一項專門設計用於保護應用程式免受複雜 DDoS 攻擊的服務。它提供自動化保護功能，並允許與 AWS DDoS 回應團隊 (DRT) 協作實施緩解措施。另外，也提供了詳細的攻擊分析和審計功能，完全滿足題主的要求。此選項是正確的選擇，因為它提供全面的 DDoS 保護和審核功能，且配置更簡單。
C.en: Correct. Performance analysis: AWS Shield Advanced is a service specifically designed to protect applications from sophisticated DDoS attacks. It provides automated protection capabilities and allows collaboration with the AWS DDoS Response Team (DRT) to implement mitigation measures. In addition, it also provides detailed attack analysis and auditing functions, which fully meets the requirements of the question. This option is the right one as it provides comprehensive DDoS protection and auditing capabilities and is simpler to configure.

D.zh: 錯誤。效能分析：CloudFront 可以幫助減輕 DDoS 攻擊，並與 AWS WAF 結合使用來過濾流量。不過，與AWS Shield Advanced相比，CloudFront的DDoS防護功能更加基礎，無法提供與AWS DDoS響應團隊（DRT）的直接協作，也沒有提及審計功能。此選項部分正確，但不如選項C全面，無法完全滿足題目要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Performance analysis: CloudFront can help mitigate DDoS attacks and is used in conjunction with AWS WAF to filter traffic. However, compared with AWS Shield Advanced, CloudFront's DDoS protection functions are more basic and cannot provide direct collaboration with AWS DDoS Response Team (DRT), nor does it mention auditing functions. This option is partially correct, but it is not as comprehensive as option C and cannot fully meet the requirements of the question.

answer_text.zh: C. 訂閱 AWS Shield Advanced。與 AWS DDoS 回應團隊 (DRT) 合作，將緩解控制措施整合到服務中。
answer_text.en: C. Subscribe to AWS Shield Advanced. Engage the AWS DDoS Response Team (DRT) to integrate mitigating controls into the service.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：效能分析：AWS Shield Advanced 是一項專門設計用於保護應用程式免受複雜 DDoS 攻擊的服務。它提供自動化保護功能，並允許與 AWS DDoS 回應團隊 (DRT) 協作實施緩解措施。另外，也提供了詳細的攻擊分析和審計功能，完全滿足題主的要求。此選項是正確的選擇，因為它提供全面的 DDoS 保護和審核功能，且配置更簡單。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Performance analysis: AWS Shield Advanced is a service specifically designed to protect applications from sophisticated DDoS attacks. It provides automated protection capabilities and allows collaboration with the AWS DDoS Response Team (DRT) to implement mitigation measures. In addition, it also provides detailed attack analysis and auditing functions, which fully meets the requirements of the question. This option is the right one as it provides comprehensive DDoS protection and auditing capabilities and is simpler to configure.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司將最近一次海洋調查中的 200 TB 資料複製到 AWS Snowball Edge Storage Optimized 設備上。該公司擁有託管在 AWS 上的高效能運算 (HPC) 集群，用於尋找石油和天然氣礦藏。解決方案架構師必須為叢集提供一致的亞毫秒延遲以及對 Snowball Edge Storage Optimized 裝置上資料的高吞吐量存取。該公司正在將設備送回 AWS。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company copies 200 TB of data from a recent ocean survey onto AWS Snowball Edge Storage Optimized devices. The company has a high performance computing (HPC) cluster that is hosted on AWS to look for oil and gas deposits. A solutions architect must provide the cluster with consistent sub-millisecond latency and high-throughput access to the data on the Snowball Edge Storage Optimized devices. The company is sending the devices back to AWS. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 建立 Amazon S3 儲存桶。將資料匯入到 S3 儲存桶中。配置 AWS Storage Gateway 檔案閘道以使用 S3 儲存桶。從 HPC 叢集實例存取檔案閘道。
A.en: Create an Amazon S3 bucket. Import the data into the S3 bucket. Configure an AWS Storage Gateway file gateway to use the S3 bucket. Access the file gateway from the HPC cluster instances.

B.zh: 建立 Amazon S3 儲存桶。將資料匯入到 S3 儲存桶中。配置 Amazon FSx for Lustre 檔案系統，並將其與 S3 儲存桶整合。從 HPC 叢集實例存取 FSx for Lustre 檔案系統。
B.en: Create an Amazon S3 bucket. Import the data into the S3 bucket. Configure an Amazon FSx for Lustre file system, and integrate it with the S3 bucket. Access the FSx for Lustre file system from the HPC cluster instances.

C.zh: 建立 Amazon S3 儲存桶和 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) 檔案系統。將資料匯入到 S3 儲存桶中。將資料從 S3 儲存桶複製到 EFS 檔案系統。從 HPC 叢集實例存取 EFS 檔案系統。
C.en: Create an Amazon S3 bucket and an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system. Import the data into the S3 bucket. Copy the data from the S3 bucket to the EFS file system. Access the EFS file system from the HPC cluster instances.

D.zh: 建立 Amazon FSx for Lustre 檔案系統。將資料直接匯入 FSx for Lustre 檔案系統。從 HPC 叢集實例存取 FSx for Lustre 檔案系統。
D.en: Create an Amazon FSx for Lustre file system. Import the data directly into the FSx for Lustre file system. Access the FSx for Lustre file system from the HPC cluster instances.

A.zh: 錯誤。原因：AWS Storage Gateway 雖然可以提供對 S3 資料的訪問​​，但其性能無法滿足 HPC 環境的低延遲和高吞吐量要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Reason: Although AWS Storage Gateway can provide access to S3 data, its performance cannot meet the low latency and high throughput requirements of HPC environments.

B.zh: 正確。原因：Amazon FSx for Lustre 是一款專為高效能運算而設計的檔案系統，可提供亞毫秒延遲和高吞吐量。與S3整合後，可以快速存取和處理數據，非常適合HPC場景。
B.en: Correct. Reason: Amazon FSx for Luster is a file system designed for high-performance computing, providing sub-millisecond latency and high throughput. After integrating with S3, data can be accessed and processed quickly, which is very suitable for HPC scenarios.

C.zh: 錯誤。原因：Amazon EFS 雖然提供文件存儲，但性能不如 FSx for Lustre，無法滿足 HPC 環境的低延遲和高吞吐量要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Reason: Although Amazon EFS provides file storage, its performance is not as good as FSx for Luster and cannot meet the low latency and high throughput requirements of HPC environments.

D.zh: 錯誤。原因：雖然 FSx for Lustre 適用於 HPC 場景，但問題需要將資料從 Snowball Edge 裝置匯入到 AWS。直接導入FSx for Lustre檔案系統不符合問題中「將資料導入S3」的步驟。
D.en: Incorrect. Reason: Although FSx for Luster is suitable for HPC scenarios, the question requires importing data from the Snowball Edge device to AWS. Directly importing into the FSx for Luster file system does not comply with the steps of "importing data to S3" stated in the question.

answer_text.zh: B. 建立 Amazon S3 儲存桶。將資料匯入到 S3 儲存桶中。配置 Amazon FSx for Lustre 檔案系統，並將其與 S3 儲存桶整合。從 HPC 叢集實例存取 FSx for Lustre 檔案系統。
answer_text.en: B. Create an Amazon S3 bucket. Import the data into the S3 bucket. Configure an Amazon FSx for Lustre file system, and integrate it with the S3 bucket. Access the FSx for Lustre file system from the HPC cluster instances.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (67%)； D (33%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：原因：Amazon FSx for Lustre 是一款專為高效能運算而設計的檔案系統，可提供亞毫秒延遲和高吞吐量。與S3整合後，可以快速存取和處理數據，非常適合HPC場景。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (67%); D (33%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Reason: Amazon FSx for Luster is a file system designed for high-performance computing, providing sub-millisecond latency and high throughput. After integrating with S3, data can be accessed and processed quickly, which is very suitable for HPC scenarios.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在本地資料中心擁有 NFS 伺服器，需要定期將少量資料備份到 Amazon S3。哪種解決方案滿足這些要求並且最具成本效益？
question_text.en: A company has NFS servers in an on-premises data center that need to periodically back up small amounts of data to Amazon S3. Which solution meets these requirements and is MOST cost-effective?

A.zh: 設定 AWS Glue 以將資料從本機伺服器複製到 Amazon S3。
A.en: Set up AWS Glue to copy the data from the on-premises servers to Amazon S3.

B.zh: 在本機伺服器上設定 AWS DataSync 代理，並將資料同步到 Amazon S3。
B.en: Set up an AWS DataSync agent on the on-premises servers, and sync the data to Amazon S3.

C.zh: 使用 AWS Transfer for SFTP 設定 SFTP 同步，以將資料從本機同步到 Amazon S3。
C.en: Set up an SFTP sync using AWS Transfer for SFTP to sync data from on premises to Amazon S3.

D.zh: 在本機資料中心和 VPC 之間設定 AWS Direct Connect 連接，並將資料複製到 Amazon S3。
D.en: Set up an AWS Direct Connect connection between the on-premises data center and a VPC, and copy the data to Amazon S3.

A.zh: 錯誤。AWS Glue 主要用於 ETL（提取、轉換、載入）任務，適合處理大規模資料轉換和分析，而不是簡單的檔案備份任務。成本較高，不適合小數據量的定期備份場景。
A.en: Incorrect. AWS Glue is mainly used for ETL (extract, transform, load) tasks and is suitable for processing large-scale data conversion and analysis, rather than simple file backup tasks. The cost is high and it is not suitable for regular backup scenarios of small amounts of data.

B.zh: 正確。AWS DataSync 專為有效率、安全地遷移和同步資料而設計。支援NFS協議，適合小量資料的定期備份。成本最佳化：DataSync以使用量收費，適合此場景。
B.en: Correct. AWS DataSync is specially designed to migrate and synchronize data efficiently and securely. It supports the NFS protocol and is suitable for regular backup of small amounts of data. Cost optimization: DataSync charges based on usage, which is suitable for this scenario.

C.zh: 錯誤。AWS Transfer for SFTP適合基於SFTP協定的檔案傳輸，問題中明確提到了NFS協定的使用。不符合場景要求。
C.en: Incorrect. AWS Transfer for SFTP is suitable for file transfer based on the SFTP protocol, and the question clearly mentions the use of the NFS protocol. Does not meet scene requirements.

D.zh: 錯誤。AWS Direct Connect 適用於需要高頻寬和低延遲的場景。成本較高，不適合小量資料的定期備份。複雜，不符合成本優化的要求。
D.en: Incorrect. AWS Direct Connect is suitable for scenarios that require high bandwidth and low latency. The cost is high and it is not suitable for regular backup of small amounts of data. It is complex and does not meet the requirements of cost optimization.

answer_text.zh: B. 在本機伺服器上設定 AWS DataSync 代理，並將資料同步到 Amazon S3。
answer_text.en: B. Set up an AWS DataSync agent on the on-premises servers, and sync the data to Amazon S3.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：AWS DataSync 專為有效率、安全地遷移和同步資料而設計。支援NFS協議，適合小量資料的定期備份。成本最佳化：DataSync以使用量收費，適合此場景。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS DataSync is specially designed to migrate and synchronize data efficiently and securely. It supports the NFS protocol and is suitable for regular backup of small amounts of data. Cost optimization: DataSync charges based on usage, which is suitable for this scenario.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 線上電玩公司必須保持其遊戲伺服器的超低延遲。遊戲伺服器在 Amazon EC2 執行個體上執行。該公司需要一個能夠每秒處理數百萬個 UDP 網路流量請求的解決方案。哪一種解決方案能夠最具成本效益地滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: An online video game company must maintain ultra-low latency for its game servers. The game servers run on Amazon EC2 instances. The company needs a solution that can handle millions of UDP internet traffic requests each second. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

A.zh: 使用 Internet 流量所需的協定和連接埠來設定應用程式負載平衡器。指定 EC2 執行個體為目標。
A.en: Configure an Application Load Balancer with the required protocol and ports for the internet traffic. Specify the EC2 instances as the targets.

B.zh: 為網際網路流量設定網關負載平衡器。指定 EC2 執行個體為目標。
B.en: Configure a Gateway Load Balancer for the internet traffic. Specify the EC2 instances as the targets.

C.zh: 使用網際網路流量所需的協定和連接埠來設定網路負載平衡器。指定 EC2 執行個體為目標。
C.en: Configure a Network Load Balancer with the required protocol and ports for the internet traffic. Specify the EC2 instances as the targets.

D.zh: 在不同 AWS 區域的 EC2 執行個體上啟動一組相同的遊戲伺服器。將網際網路流量路由到兩組 EC2 執行個體。
D.en: Launch an identical set of game servers on EC2 instances in separate AWS Regions. Route internet traffic to both sets of EC2 instances.

A.zh: 錯誤。應用程式負載平衡器（ALB）主要用於處理HTTP和HTTPS流量，支援高階內部路由和基於應用層的負載平衡。 ALB不支援UDP協議，因此無法滿足題目要求。錯誤原因：ALB不適合處理UDP流量。
A.en: Incorrect. Application Load Balancer (ALB) is mainly used to process HTTP and HTTPS traffic, supporting advanced internal routing and application layer-based load balancing. ALB does not support the UDP protocol, so it cannot meet the question requirements. Reason for the error: ALB is not suitable for processing UDP traffic.

B.zh: 錯誤。閘道負載平衡器（GLB）主要用於第三方虛擬網路設備的集成，例如防火牆、入侵偵測系統等。雖然GLB支援UDP流量，但其設計目標並不是低延遲場景，而是網路流量的過濾和管理。錯誤原因：GLB並不是專門為高效能、低延遲的負載平衡而設計的。
B.en: Incorrect. Gateway Load Balancer (GLB) is mainly used for the integration of third-party virtual network devices, such as firewalls and intrusion detection systems. Although GLB supports UDP traffic, its design goal is not low latency scenarios, but the filtering and management of network traffic. Reason for the error: GLB is not specifically designed for high-performance, low-latency load balancing.

C.zh: 正確。網路負載平衡器 (NLB) 專為處理高效能、低延遲場景而設計，支援 TCP 和 UDP 協定。 NLB每秒可以處理數百萬個請求，非常適合問題中提到的需求。 NLB 是處理 UDP 流量和低延遲場景的最佳選擇。
C.en: Correct. Network Load Balancer (NLB) is specially designed to handle high-performance, low-latency scenarios and supports TCP and UDP protocols. NLB can handle millions of requests per second and is very suitable for the needs mentioned in the question. NLB is the best choice for handling UDP traffic and low latency scenarios.

D.zh: 錯誤。跨地域部署雖然可以提高可用資源，但並不能直接解決低時延、高效能的需求。此外，跨區域流量路由會增加成本和複雜性。錯誤原因：跨地域部署並不是解決低延遲和高效能的最佳方式。
D.en: Incorrect. Although cross-region deployment can improve available resources, it cannot directly solve the requirements of low latency and high performance. Additionally, cross-region traffic routing can add cost and complexity. Reason for the error: Cross-region deployment is not the best way to solve low latency and high performance.

answer_text.zh: C. 使用網際網路流量所需的協定和連接埠來設定網路負載平衡器。指定 EC2 執行個體為目標。
answer_text.en: C. Configure a Network Load Balancer with the required protocol and ports for the internet traffic. Specify the EC2 instances as the targets.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：網路負載平衡器 (NLB) 專為處理高效能、低延遲場景而設計，支援 TCP 和 UDP 協定。 NLB每秒可以處理數百萬個請求，非常適合問題中提到的需求。 NLB 是處理 UDP 流量和低延遲場景的最佳選擇。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Network Load Balancer (NLB) is specially designed to handle high-performance, low-latency scenarios and supports TCP and UDP protocols. NLB can handle millions of requests per second and is very suitable for the needs mentioned in the question. NLB is the best choice for handling UDP traffic and low latency scenarios.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在 VPC 中運行三層應用程式。資料庫層使用 Amazon RDS for MySQL 資料庫執行個體。該公司計劃將 RDS for MySQL 資料庫執行個體遷移到 Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL 資料庫叢集。該公司需要一個解決方案來複製遷移到新資料庫期間發生的資料變更。哪一種步驟組合可以滿足這些要求？ （選兩個。）
question_text.en: A company runs a three-tier application in a VPC. The database tier uses an Amazon RDS for MySQL DB instance. The company plans to migrate the RDS for MySQL DB instance to an Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL DB cluster. The company needs a solution that replicates the data changes that happen during the migration to the new database. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 使用 AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) 架構轉換來轉換資料庫物件。
A.en: Use AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) Schema Conversion to transform the database objects.

B.zh: 使用 AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) 架構轉換在 RDS for MySQL 資料庫執行個體上建立 Aurora PostgreSQL 唯讀副本。
B.en: Use AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) Schema Conversion to create an Aurora PostgreSQL read replica on the RDS for MySQL DB instance.

C.zh: 為 RDS for MySQL 資料庫執行個體設定 Aurora MySQL 唯讀副本。
C.en: Configure an Aurora MySQL read replica for the RDS for MySQL DB instance.

D.zh: 使用變更資料擷取 (CDC) 定義 AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) 任務來遷移資料。
D.en: Define an AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) task with change data capture (CDC) to migrate the data.

E.zh: 當副本落後為零時，將 Aurora PostgreSQL 唯讀副本提升為獨立的 Aurora PostgreSQL 資料庫叢集。
E.en: Promote the Aurora PostgreSQL read replica to a standalone Aurora PostgreSQL DB cluster when the replica lag is zero.

A.zh: 正確。AWS DMS 架構轉換工具可以將來源資料庫的架構轉換為目標資料庫的架構，特別是在跨資料庫引擎（例如 MySQL 到 PostgreSQL）遷移時。
A.en: Correct. The AWS DMS Schema Conversion tool can convert the source database's schema to the target database's schema, especially when migrating across database engines (such as MySQL to PostgreSQL).

B.zh: 錯誤。AWS DMS 架構轉換工具用於架構轉換，而不是建立 Aurora PostgreSQL 的唯讀副本。 Aurora PostgreSQL 和 RDS MySQL 是不同的資料庫引擎，無法間接建立跨引擎只讀副本。
B.en: Incorrect. The AWS DMS Schema Conversion tool is used for schema conversion, not to create a read-only copy of Aurora PostgreSQL. Aurora PostgreSQL and RDS MySQL are different database engines, and cross-engine read replicas cannot be created indirectly.

C.zh: 錯誤。Aurora MySQL 和 RDS MySQL 屬於相同資料庫引擎，可以建立唯讀副本，但問題需要遷移到 Aurora PostgreSQL，與 Aurora MySQL 無關。
C.en: Incorrect. Aurora MySQL and RDS MySQL belong to the same database engine and can create read-only replicas, but the question requires migrating to Aurora PostgreSQL, which has nothing to do with Aurora MySQL.

D.zh: 正確。AWS DMS 支援使用變更資料擷取 (CDC) 即時擷取來源資料庫中的變更並將這些變更同步至目標資料庫。這是在遷移過程中保持資料一致性的關鍵步驟。
D.en: Correct. AWS DMS supports using Change Data Capture (CDC) to capture changes in the source database in real time and synchronize these changes to the target database. This is a critical step in maintaining data consistency during the migration process.

E.zh: 錯誤。Aurora PostgreSQL 和 RDS MySQL 是不同的資料庫引擎。 Aurora PostgreSQL 的唯讀副本無法直接創建，因此無法將其提升為獨立的 Aurora PostgreSQL 叢集。
E.en: Incorrect. Aurora PostgreSQL and RDS MySQL are different database engines. Read-only replicas of Aurora PostgreSQL cannot be created directly, so they cannot be promoted to independent Aurora PostgreSQL clusters.

answer_text.zh: A. 使用 AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) 架構轉換來轉換資料庫物件。；D. 使用變更資料擷取 (CDC) 定義 AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) 任務來遷移資料。
answer_text.en: A. Use AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) Schema Conversion to transform the database objects.; D. Define an AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) task with change data capture (CDC) to migrate the data.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：AD (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：AWS DMS 架構轉換工具可以將來源資料庫的架構轉換為目標資料庫的架構，特別是在跨資料庫引擎（例如 MySQL 到 PostgreSQL）遷移時。；AWS DMS 支援使用變更資料擷取 (CDC) 即時擷取來源資料庫中的變更並將這些變更同步至目標資料庫。這是在遷移過程中保持資料一致性的關鍵步驟。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: AD (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: The AWS DMS Schema Conversion tool can convert the source database's schema to the target database's schema, especially when migrating across database engines (such as MySQL to PostgreSQL).; AWS DMS supports using Change Data Capture (CDC) to capture changes in the source database in real time and synchronize these changes to the target database. This is a critical step in maintaining data consistency during the migration process.
